description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with graphic print on the frontFitComfortWash careHand wash separately in cool water at 30 degrees Do not scrub Do not bleach Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron on reverseDo not iron on printFor the politically aware, this inkfruit t-shirt de-constructs the Rupee symbol. The energetic graphic print keeps your mood upbeat, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with form fitting denims and trekking shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6" and shoulders 18"
